imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Mediatube app download promotional banner with dark background and gradient accents showing a stylized mobile phone screen (download-banner.dim_1200x400.png)

existing_features.title: Add an app download page or section that allows users to download the Mediatube app. Include download buttons/links for major platforms (e.g., Android APK, iOS) with appropriate platform icons and a visually appealing layout consistent with the existing dark theme.
